retry_reason: Failure (NULL return) means the ID was not found in the IDR. The object may have been freed or never existed; retrying with the same ID will not change the result.
contract_summary: This get-wrapper acquires a reference on an amdgpu_ctx by its ID. The caller must later call amdgpu_ctx_put to release the reference. The function returns NULL if the ID is not found, indicating the context does not exist or has been removed. The lookup is protected by a mutex, ensuring thread safety.
